description: Fully managed SQL database with complete T-SQL support (stored procedures, triggers, views). Operational database for transactional workloads. Requires F4+ capacity. Supports point-in-time restore and database mirroring.

flags.--source-id: Source database ID for Restore mode

notes: REQUIRES F4+ capacity (F2 fails with error 18456 State 240 on TDS)
Import command: reads CSV/JSON, infers types, generates CREATE TABLE + batched INSERTs
Hard delete: --hard-delete permanently removes (vs soft delete for restore)
connection-string resolves serverFqdn from properties automatically
